qdrantUrl.label: Qdrant URL
qdrantUrl.help: Qdrant REST API endpoint. Defaults to http://localhost:6333.

embedding.provider.label: Embedding Provider
embedding.provider.help: One of: voyage, openai, ollama, google, jina. Auto-detected from env vars if not set.

embedding.model.label: Embedding Model
embedding.model.help: Model name for the embedding provider. Defaults are picked based on provider.

embedding.apiKey.label: Embedding API Key
embedding.apiKey.help: API key for the embedding provider. Auto-detected from env vars if not set.

embedding.baseUrl.label: Embedding Base URL
embedding.baseUrl.help: Base URL for Ollama or self-hosted embeddings. Defaults to http://localhost:11434 for ollama.

embedding.dimensions.label: Embedding Dimensions
embedding.dimensions.help: Vector dimensions. Auto-detected from provider if not set.

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Inject relevant memories before every AI turn

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically store conversation turns to Qdrant

maxRecallResults.label: Max Recall Results
maxRecallResults.help: Maximum memories injected into context per turn

accessLevel.label: Access Level
accessLevel.help: Agent access level: public, trusted, or private. Controls which memories are visible.

debug.label: Debug Logging
debug.help: Enable verbose debug logs for Qdrant and embedding API calls
